### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common (github.com/containers/common)</summary>

### [`v0.59.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.59.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.58.3...v0.59.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump c/storage to v1.53.0, c/image to v5.30.0, and common to v0.58.0, then to v0.59.0-dev by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1886](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1886)

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
